{{Quote|You are to eliminate one Fidaval. I don't know where he is, but I know who does. If you apply a little pressure, his brother Ratheb will tell you all you need.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BH" />}}
'''Fidaval''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was the brother of [[Ratheb]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Okay! I will tell you, just please leave us alone! He is hiding in the Atrium. Do you have to kill him?|[[Ratheb]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BH" />}}
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Fidaval and his brother [[Ratheb]] resided on board [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. During that time, Fidaval was a wanted man and even had a [[Death mark/Legends|death mark]] on his head.<ref name="SWG:BH" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] localized the two brothers to Tansarii Point Station. Meanwhile, Boba Fett was also training a spacer who wished to become a bounty hunter and realized that hunting Fidaval could be a good exercise. Fett therefore tasked the spacer to interrogate Ratheb about his brother. The former was indeed not willing to share any information about Fidaval but the spacer eventually forced him to reveal the location of his brother. The spacer then confronted Fidaval and his [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] in the atrium of the station and finally killed the wanted Devaronian.<ref name="SWG:BH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fidaval appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BH" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Fidaval was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:BH" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
